debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l : List (List α)
l1 : List α
idx idx1 : ℕ
hidx : idx < l.length
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
⊢ ∃ idx',
    (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.eraseIdx ↑idx' ∧
      l1[idx1] = (l.set idx l1).flatten[idx']

simp at hidx
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp only [List.set_cons_zero, List.flatten_cons]
            have hlen : idx1 < (l1 ++ tl.flatten).length := by
              simp only [List.length_append]
              omega
            refine ⟨⟨idx1, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
            · simp only [List.set_cons_zero, List.flatten_cons, List.length_append]
              omega
            · simp only [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt_length hidx1]
            · simp only [List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
        | succ idx' HR =>
          cases l with
          | nil => simp at hidx
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right] at hidx
            obtain ⟨idx'', h1, h2⟩ := @HR tl hidx

            · simp only [List.set_cons_succ, List.flatten_cons]
              rw [List.getElem_append_right (by omega)]
              simp only [Nat.add_sub_cancel_left]
              exact h2

            simp only [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt_length hidx1, List.getElem_append_left hidx1,
              Fin.val_mk, and_self]
        | succ idx' HR =>
          cases l with
          | nil => simp at hidx
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right] at hidx
            simp only [List.set_cons_succ, List.flatten_cons]
            obtain ⟨idx'', h1, h2⟩ := @HR tl hidx
            use ⟨hd.length + idx''.val, by simp; omega⟩
            simp only [Fin.val_mk]
            constructor
            · simp only [List.eraseIdx_append_of_length_le (by omega : hd.length ≤ hd.length + ↑idx'')]
              congr 1
              convert h1 using 2
              omega
            · rw [List.getElem_append_right (by omega)]
              convert h2 using 2
              omega
sorry

sorry
        have hidx'_bound : offset + idx1 < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by sorry
        refine ⟨⟨offset + idx1, hidx'_bound⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
        · sorry
        · sorry

simp at hidx
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp only [List.set_cons_zero, List.flatten_cons]
            have hlen : idx1 < (l1 ++ tl.flatten).length := by
              simp; left; exact hidx1
            use ⟨idx1, hlen⟩
            simp only [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt_length hidx1]
            constructor
            · rfl
            · simp [List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
        | succ idx' HR =>
          cases l with
          | nil => simp at hidx
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right] at hidx
            obtain ⟨idx'', h1, h2⟩ := @HR tl hidx
            simp only [List.set_cons_succ, List.flatten_cons]
            have hlen : hd.length + idx''.val < (hd ++ (tl.set idx' l1).flatten).length := by
              simp; exact idx''.isLt
            use ⟨hd.length + idx''.val, hlen⟩
            constructor
            · simp only [List.eraseIdx_append_of_length_le (by omega : hd.length ≤ hd.length + idx''.val)]
              simp only [Nat.add_sub_cancel_left, h1]
            · simp only [List.getElem_append_right (by omega : hd.length ≤ hd.length + idx''.val)]
              simp only [Nat.add_sub_cancel_left, h2]
sorry

sorry
        exact ⟨⟨flatIdx, hflatLen⟩, by sorry, by sorry⟩
